scope_modes.label: No admitted channels
scope_modes.meaning: Layer 3 records that the MVP Scope admits zero live channels.

scope_modes.label: Carrier eligibility
scope_modes.meaning: Carrier readings may become future channel questions, but carriers are not channels.

scope_modes.label: Six-nine boundary question
scope_modes.meaning: The six-nine receipt neighborhood can be inspected as a future permission region without admitting transport.

scope_modes.label: Return-cell question
scope_modes.meaning: Return-cell channel receipts exist upstream, but the MVP Scope does not admit or render them.

keeper: Carriers show readable structure. Channels ask permission. The MVP Scope admits zero live channels.
